name: open-pulse
description: Skills and guided scaffolding for building dashboards on the Open Pulse open-research-software observatory.

plugins.name: open-pulse
plugins.description: Build dashboards on the Open Pulse platform — a guided /open-pulse:new-dashboard wizard, query skills for Neo4j/SPARQL/OpenSearch/CHAOSS, the hub op-* skills, and the SDSC design-system skills.
